channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
item.description: The incident comes as Tata Electronics expands its role in global technology supply chains.

item.title: Samsung 24in S30GD minimalist monitor drops to the lowest price I've ever seen – this early Amazon Prime Day deal is a great workspace upgrade for less than $80
item.description: Samsung 24in S30GD ergonomic monitor with 100Hz LCD screen, Eye Saver and Game Picture mode drops to its lowest ever early Prime Day Price.

item.title: I use AirTags every time I travel, and Amazon just dropped Apple's newest model to a record-low price
item.description: Save on a single or a pack of four

item.title: Test du Mammotion Luba 3 AWD : le 4×4 des jardins n’a plus besoin d’antenne RTK
item.description: Après avoir bousculé le marché des robots tondeuses avec son emblématique Luba, Mammotion revient à la charge avec la Luba 3 AWD. Sa principale nouveauté consiste en une navigation Tri-Fusion ultra-précise et entièrement sans-fil, combinant un LiDAR à 360°, une double caméra dopée à l’IA et le positionnement NetRTK. Pari réussi pour cette nouvelle génération ? On a testé. ...

item.title: The LG C5 is the 5-star OLED TV I’d recommend for both the World Cup and GTA 6 — and you can get it for a record-low price ahead of Prime Day, but it won’t stick around for long
item.description: The LG C5 is one of the best all-around TVs I've ever tested, and its price has dropped to a record-low.

item.title: La fin du monde ne sera peut-être pas celle que les astronomes imaginaient : le scénario final vient de changer
item.description: Le destin de notre Terre semblait scellé. Elle allait être engloutie par un Soleil devenu géante rouge. Mais une nouvelle étude vient semer le doute. Et si notre planète parvenait, finalement, à échapper au pire ?

item.title: I’ve tested more than 20 soundbars, but these 4 affordable models are my picks for cinematic sound on a budget — including ultra-cheap all-in-one bars and awesome Dolby Atmos options
item.description: These 4 soundbars I tested deliver exceptional quality without forcing you to break the bank — with ultra-cheap options and budget-friendly Dolby Atmos alternatives.

item.title: Get two months of Dutton Ranch, Tulsa King and more for under $2 with this Paramount+ streaming deal
item.description: Pick up Paramount+ for under $2 for two months with this limited-time streaming deal, and unlock Taylor Sheridan's TV universe for less.

item.title: Le puissant ventilateur Dreo TurboPoly Fan 306 est en promotion
item.description: Préparer les vagues de chaleur sans vider son compte en banque est désormais possible. Le surprenant ventilateur Dreo TurboPoly Fan 306 passe temporairement de 85,16 euros à 72,19 euros chez Amzon.

item.title: Too rainy or hot to run outdoors? Tired of missing your favorite shows? I've scoured the internet for some of the best Amazon Prime Day treadmill deals
item.description: The last 24 hours of heatwaves and rainstorms has me considering giving up running outdoors and getting a treadmill.

item.title: Planning your next vacation? Get your handheld gaming upgrades ready with a bunch of my favorite accessories
item.description: All these handheld gaming upgrades I’ve found this Prime Day mean that no matter where you go on your vacation this year, you can have a fantastic gaming setup in your backpack.

item.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
item.description: European offensive cybersecurity company Paradigm Shift released details of a flaw and a technique to exploit it that opens the door for hackers to unlock and break into older iPhones.

item.title: Separate fact from fiction: AI and the future of work
item.description: Leaders and staff members need to learn the best ways to incorporate AI into the workflow. At the Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA), we enable high-level women to mentor each other to achieve personal and professional success through sisterhood. As the nonprofit organization’s founder, chair, and CEO, I am honored to share insights from thought leaders who are part of our peer-to-peer mentoring community....

item.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
item.description: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

item.title: DoorDash wants to engage with the World Cup’s newest superstar—but it keeps entering the wrong chat
item.description: Harmless mistake or cringe marketing ploy? There are many ways that soccer players can turn into legends, especially during a World Cup. But thanks to social media, athletes don’t need to score a goal or win a match for fame—they just need enough people on board.

item.title: ‘So much for caring about the environment’: REI faces backlash over AI-generated ad suspicions
item.description: A deformed bike had social media convinced that REI used AI for its advertising, undermining the brand’s eco-friendly reputation. Given data centers’ massive water and energy usage, noise pollution, and contribution to rising temperatures, it’s clear that artificial intelligence and the great outdoors just don’t mix. That means brands catering to the tree huggers out there should steer clear of generative AI in their marketing—a lesson that outdoor gear retailer REI may have just learned the hard way....

item.title: I can't use asymmetrical gaming controllers — here's what I'd recommend instead, along with some other favorites
item.description: Some of my favorite third-party gaming controllers could be the ones to watch this Prime Day

item.title: Valve l’a confirmé : vous pouvez maintenant transformer n’importe quel PC en Steam Machine
item.description: Valve donne enfin son feu vert pour installer SteamOS sur n'importe quel PC de bureau. Avec une grosse exception : les cartes graphiques Nvidia restent sur le carreau (pour l'instant).

item.title: The Dolby Atmos soundbar I use every day just got a rare discount, and I couldn't recommend it highly enough — here's why I'd buy it now
item.description: My favorite all-in-one soundbar I use at home is finally discounted — here's why I'd recommend it to everyone.

item.title: Ray-Ban Meta Optics review: A better fit comes with a higher price
item.description: The Ray-Ban Meta Optics lineup adds a premium fit and a few extra features, but comes with a higher price.

item.title: New lightweight, self-propagating crypto stealing malware delivered by USB spotted by Microsoft researchers – Crypto Clipper script-based stealer hunts for vulnerable wallets
item.description: Microsoft details a newly discovered wormlike infostealer called Crypto Clipper.

item.title: Lucid layoffs today: EV maker cuts 18% of jobs, LCID stock takes a dive
item.description: Lucid Motors will decrease its U.S. workforce by 1,500 employees in a cost-cutting plan estimated to save $158 million, the company said Monday. Lucid Motors said it is laying off about 18% of its U.S. workforce, or around 1,500 workers, in a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Monday.

item.title: Steam Machine : Valve change tout pour la pré-commande, et cliquer vite ne suffit plus
item.description: Valve ouvre les pré-commandes de sa Steam Machine, ne favorise plus les utilisateurs les plus rapides : cette fois, c'est un tirage au sort qui décidera des premiers chanceux. Une réponse directe au fiasco du Steam Controller.

item.title: We Tried the Most Popular Mushroom Coffees. These Are the Best (2026)
item.description: “Coffee” made with functional mushrooms like lion’s mane and chaga is all the rage. We tried the most popular brands to find which were the most palatable.

item.title: Career pathways are everywhere, but jobs aren’t
item.description: Most career pathways are built from what schools can offer. Every school district in America has a career pathways strategy. Very few have a realistic destination. To support our future workforce, states are passing legislation. Philanthropy is writing checks. Districts are rebranding their career and technical education departments with sleek new logos and career “clusters” that sound like startup accelerators....

item.title: This HP laptop is Amazon's best-selling Windows notebook but please don't buy it or you will sorely regret it
item.description: Even with a 37% discount, this N100-based HP laptop just doesn’t deliver the goods

item.title: Anthropic says Claude may want to see your ID
item.description: Claude's chatbot may ask to verify your age and identity "in certain circumstances," such as with a passport or driver's license, according to a privacy policy change.

item.title: How to watch France vs Iraq: Free Streams & TV Channels online from anywhere as Kylian Mbappe & Co. continue FIFA World Cup 2026 journey
item.description: Here's how to watch France vs Iraq for free online and from anywhere in Group I of the FIFA World Cup 2026, as Kylian Mbappe's side seek a knockout spot.

item.title: The super-affordable Nespresso Vertuo Pop is tempting me to finally bring a coffee machine back to my home, thanks to this cheap Prime Day deal
item.description: The Nespresso Vertuo Pop is one of the cheapest entry-level coffee machines so far this Prime Day.

item.title: With GTA 6 pre-orders coming, here are some PS5 and Xbox gaming accessory upgrades that I'd recommend as someone who tests hardware for a living
item.description: As a gaming hardware expert, these are the areas I'd recommend upgrading in your setup alongside bagging a GTA 6 pre-order this week

item.title: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
item.description: The Apple Watch SE 3 is at an all-time low of $199, making the sleeper hit of last year’s Apple Watches an even better value. While the Series 11 and Ultra 3 were iterative updates, the SE 3 was a wide-ranging glow-up that added an always-on display, gestures like double tap and wrist flick, a […]

item.title: The Steam Machine is the start of an even more expensive future for game consoles
item.description: It's no secret that just about every aspect of video games is getting more expensive. Game consoles are getting regular price hikes, PC components are spiking in cost, and the golden age of affordable handhelds is over, all largely due to the global RAM shortage, which has had a similarly costly impact on PC gaming, […]

item.title: Buc-ee’s just crossed another state off its expansion map. Is yours next?
item.description: Buc-ee’s newest store marks the chain’s debut in Arizona and its latest step in a rapid national expansion plan. The US convenience store, travel center, and Texas-themed gas station, Buc-ee’s, is expanding.

item.title: Clive Davis, legendary music mogul, has died at 94
item.description: Davis’ decades-long legacy spanned multiple genres and labels. Clive Davis, the record company lawyer who became one of the music industry’s most powerful figures, launching or resurrecting the careers of such superstars as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys, has died, his family confirmed. He was 94.

item.title: Climatiseur mobile : comment éviter la dépression qui plombe ses performances
item.description: Votre climatiseur mobile souffle du froid, mais la pièce ne descend jamais vraiment ? Le coupable porte un nom : la dépression. On vous explique le phénomène, et surtout comment le limiter, du simple kit de calfeutrage à la pièce imprimée en 3D.

item.title: This free tool is helping drivers avoid automatic license plate readers —as fears grow around 'intrusive' new devices that could track your phone, AirPod and smartwatch data
item.description: Automatic license plate readers are getting worryingly smart, so drivers and privacy advocates are fighting back with a free tool called DeFlock.

item.title: Uber's board sued for alleged poor oversight that led to sexual abuse of its passengers
item.description: Uber's shareholders have filed a lawsuit against the ride-sharing giant.

item.title: A complete timeline of Trump’s Reflecting Pool drama
item.description: President Trump promised to fix the Reflecting Pool quickly and cheaply. Instead we got algae, an arrest, and ongoing renovations. President Donald Trump promised a renovated Reflecting Pool that would be “American Flag Blue,” but after turning algae green, he’s admitting the project needs further repairs and the pool will have to be drained.

item.title: Valve's Steam Machine starts at $1,049 with 512GB storage and no controller
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine will cost well over $1,000, and that's without a controller.

item.title: Valves Steam Machine officially has a price, and its a doozy
item.description: The ongoing memory crisis has its latest victim: Valve's Steam Machine, which costs a lot more than it might have otherwise.

item.title: After closing all of its stores in 2024, Party City is officially back—in an unexpected place
item.description: The retailer filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy twice before shuttering. For one retailer, the party never ends. After announcing it would shutter all 700 nationwide stores in late 2024, Party City is back. Well, kind of. Consumers can now find all their celebration needs within Staples’ aisles. In April, the companies announced that Staples would begin offering Party City products inside more than 700 stores, thanks to a strategic “shop-within-a-shop” partnership....

item.title: This is the cheapest RTX 5090 laptop deal I've ever seen — Acer's Core Ultra 9 Predator drops to under $3000 and packs in 32GB RAM and 2TB SSD
item.description: For creative professionals, the Acer Predator Helios 16 AI holds nothing back.
